title: Der Mond for re release
wikitext:
[]: Der Mond for re-release             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Jul 05, 2006 10:42 am http://www.amazon.co.uk/gp/product/1421507676/026-5120959-9217265?v=glance&n=266239 hard back and set for a 10th October release. all of those years searching for one of these beauties - for under Â£100 - and finally a second chance to get my grubby grip around that strangely butch looking Rei cover. well......i think that says it all. - Ice Reaper

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 05, 2006 11:07 am Yeah i know! Unfotrunately i got mine a long time ago, for 50$! Anyway, it really worth it!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 05, 2006 11:45 am Carl Horn told me about this a number of months back, I'm glad to see this finally solidified.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Wed Jul 05, 2006 6:35 pm Holy Mother Of God!! $100?! Man......

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 05, 2006 6:42 pm reagen wrote: Holy Mother Of God!! $100?! Man......

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Wed Jul 05, 2006 9:32 pm Worth every penny if you're an Eva fan.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Thu Jul 06, 2006 7:41 am the_seventh_child wrote: Yeah i know! Unfotrunately i got mine a long time ago, for 50$! Anyway, it really worth it!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Jul 06, 2006 9:47 am ice reaper wrote: not $100 but Â£100, which at the moment is about $200 and i've seen them going for over Â£300 ($600)

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Thu Jul 06, 2006 11:04 am I saw that at a bookstore once, like 3 years ago. It as only 50 bucks, so I dunno about these 200$ ones. :?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Thu Jul 06, 2006 11:21 am the_seventh_child wrote: ice reaper wrote: not $100 but Â£100, which at the moment is about $200 and i've seen them going for over Â£300 ($600)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 06, 2006 11:53 am Well, for our American friends, it looks like it will retail for $25, and is available for pre-order at only about $16. Quite a bargain compared to what some people have been paying. I wouldn't say that any edition of the book would be worth any more than $50. http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1421507676/sr=8-4/qid=1152117414/ref=sr_1_4/104-2987515-6167109?ie=UTF8 If you've ever thought about picking this book up, now would be the time. Perhaps if it does well enough, you might see Viz bring over his previous collection, Alpha, which I think is a better collection.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Thu Jul 06, 2006 6:17 pm What's in it anyway? Arts only?

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Thu Jul 06, 2006 7:26 pm reagen wrote: What's in it anyway? Arts only?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Jul 13, 2006 2:10 pm All by some Yoshiyuki Sadamoto guy.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Jul 13, 2006 3:57 pm Now how does this comapre with Die Sterne , which was essentially just a big book of clip art?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Jul 13, 2006 4:02 pm Sounds sweet. I'll probably never get it, but none the less, sweet.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 13, 2006 4:08 pm reagen wrote: What's in it anyway? Arts only?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryousanki King » Thu Jul 13, 2006 4:36 pm Thank God, I've been waiting for this for ages ever since I heard a single whisper about it.

[]:             Quote Post by toReason » Wed Jul 26, 2006 7:45 am Thanks for the info, have just pre-ordered it. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Sun Aug 20, 2006 6:22 pm Ah yes...a hardcover too..=) It will be at my local bookstore around that time I suppose...Si i'll probably get it from there. Oh and will there be a re-release for Die Sterne as well?
